title: EXTRASTAR 50W Smart RGB LED Floodlight, 16 Colors Adjustable, Dimmable with Remote Control, IP65 Waterproof for Indoor/Outdoor Use Stage or Garden
features: Bright Floodlight Led: Delivers a strong 2600 lumens output with 50 watts of power, providing bright, efficient lighting for both outdoor and indoor spaces.
IP65 Waterproof Rating: Fully waterproof and dustproof, making it perfect for use in outdoor environments, including gardens, patios, walkways, and pool areas, regardless of weather conditions.
16 Light Colors: Features 16 customizable color options, allowing you to easily create the perfect ambiance for any occasion or mood.
Remote Control Functionality: Control all settings, including color selection, brightness, and on/off, from a distance with the included remote for added convenience.
Energy-Efficient LED Technology: Equipped with energy-saving LED bulbs, this led floodlight provides long-lasting performance while consuming minimal power, reducing energy costs.
description: With the 16 color you can choose from vibrant RGB colors (2700K-6500K) or pure white for security lighting. ajustable.
